hooks.command: if command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ -x /Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin/cmux ]; then PATH="/Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin:$PATH" cmux claude-hook notification 2>/dev/null; fi
if command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 || [ -x /Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin/cmux ]; then PATH="/Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin:$PATH" cmux claude-hook stop 2>/dev/null; fi
